subject: [PATCH v2 13/14] nfsd: separate out VFS-specific from from nfsd4_create_file()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Raised a minor concern about the comparison value in nfsd4_create_file(), suggesting it should be against nfserr_noent instead of NFSERR_NOENT.

2026-07-06.patch_summary: Reviewers are discussing the comparison of nfsd4_create_file() against nfserr_noent or NFSERR_NOENT.
